description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 10 cm Crafted from genuine leather and jute for the trims A pouch with a metal ring and jute flap, has a concealed magnetic closure A zippered compartment with a zippered separator A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
